title: mystia_izakaya
description: Hope to create an experience that is in line with the original work
body:
**Current Features:**

Includes all ingredients and dishes, with both ingredients and recipes being data-driven.

Five usable kitchen tools and a GUI with similar functionality.

Mistya's fishing rod, which can be used to catch aquatic products.

A recipe book that can be searched by tags or names, allowing ingredients to be added with one click or dishes to be cooked directly.

Added a chef's hat that monitors kitchen tools.

Collaboration with Touhou Maid, adding Night Sparrow Canteen seats and maid-related tasks, with random tag-based orders.

Future Plans:

Possible updates in the future, likely during the next TeaCon event. The goal is to develop a more complete mod.
